_comment: Multi-account rotation registry. Each entry maps an 'account slot' to a CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR. The launcher sets CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR=<config_dir> before spawning Claude, so each window uses a different Anthropic account. To set up: (1) create the folder; (2) `set CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR=<folder>` then `claude /login` once. The rotation field controls auto-pick behavior. _last_used_index is auto-updated by the launcher.

accounts.label: Default account (~/.claude/)
accounts._note: config_dir empty = use the standard ~/.claude/ directory (the account you logged into normally)

accounts.label: Account 1
accounts._note: set active=true after you run `set CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR=C:/Users/Zonia/.claude-acct1` + `claude /login` once

accounts.label: Account 2
accounts._note: same setup as acct1 with a different login
